title: Formulations
subtitle: Build production-ready formulations from your raw materials catalogue.
no_formulations_hint: Every product starts here. Click New formulation to create the first one.
row_count: {count, plural, =0 {No projects} one {# project} other {# projects}} loaded

fields.name: Product name
fields.serving_size_hint_capsule: Number of capsules the customer takes per serving (typically 1–3).
fields.serving_size_hint_default: Units the customer consumes per serving.
fields.servings_per_pack_hint: Total servings the customer gets in one pack (e.g. 30, 60, 90, 120).
fields.powder_fill_weight_hint: Target mass per scoop in grams (e.g. 10 = 10g). Total per serving = this value × scoops per serving.
fields.gummy_fill_weight_hint: Target mass per gummy. Gummy base absorbs the remainder.
fields.gummy_base_item_hint: Tick every sweetener / bulking agent that goes into the gummy. The base total (target − water − actives − flavour, min 65%) is split equally across picks. Their real nutrition + compliance + label copy flow through to the spec sheet.
fields.gummy_base_item_empty: No sweeteners or bulking agents in this catalogue. Import at least one to use the gummy builder.
fields.acidity_item_hint: Tick the acid(s) used in the gummy (e.g. Citric Acid, Trisodium Citrate). The acidity total (2% of target gummy weight) is split equally across picks. Leave empty for a generic placeholder; pick items so the MRPeasy BOM is procurement-ready.
fields.acidity_item_empty: No Acidity Regulator items in this catalogue. Tag at least one raw material with use_as = 'Acidity Regulator' to use this picker.
fields.flavouring_item_hint: Tick every flavour that goes into the gummy (e.g. Natural Strawberry Flavour, Lemon Extract). The flavour total (0.4% of target gummy weight) is split equally across picks and the spec sheet lists them under the EU label 'Flavouring (…)'.
fields.flavouring_item_empty: No Flavouring items in this catalogue. Tag at least one raw material with use_as = 'Flavouring' to use this picker.
fields.colour_item_hint: Tick every colour that goes into the gummy (e.g. Beetroot Extract, Turmeric Oleoresin, Spirulina Powder). The colour total (2% of target gummy weight) is split equally across picks and the spec sheet lists them under the EU label 'Colour (…)'.
fields.colour_item_empty: No Colour items in this catalogue. Tag at least one raw material with use_as = 'Colour' to use this picker.
fields.glazing_item_hint: Tick every glazing agent applied to the gummy surface (e.g. Carnauba Wax, Coconut Oil, Beeswax). The glaze total (0.1% of target gummy weight) is split equally across picks and the spec sheet groups them under the EU label 'Glazing Agent (…)'.
fields.glazing_item_empty: No Glazing Agent items in this catalogue. Tag at least one raw material with use_as = 'Glazing Agent' to use this picker.
fields.gelling_item_hint: Tick the gelling agent(s) used as the gel matrix (e.g. Pectin, Gelatin, Agar). The gelling total (3% of target gummy weight) is split equally across picks. Leave empty for a non-gelling gummy — the gelling and premix-sweetener bands are skipped entirely.
fields.gelling_item_empty: No Gelling Agent items in this catalogue. Tag at least one raw material with use_as = 'Gelling Agent' to use this picker.
fields.premix_sweetener_item_hint: Tick the sweetener(s) blended with the gelling agent into the in-house 'Pectin Premix' BOM line. Pulls from the same catalogue pool as the gummy base. The premix total (6% of target) is carved out of the gummy base remainder.
fields.premix_sweetener_item_empty: No Sweeteners or Bulking Agents in this catalogue. Import at least one to use this picker.
fields.water_volume_ml_hint: Flavour-system mg (acidity regulator, sweetener, flavouring and colour) scale linearly against this volume. Reference: 500ml.
fields.directions_of_use_hint: Short instruction the customer follows. Format: "Take / Chew / Mix [quantity] [with food / with water / daily] …". Keep it to a single sentence.
fields.directions_of_use_placeholder_gummy: Chew 2 gummies daily, preferably with food.
fields.directions_of_use_placeholder_powder: Mix 1 scoop (10 g) with 500 ml water. Shake well. Drink once daily.
fields.directions_of_use_placeholder_default: e.g. Take 1 capsule with food, daily.
fields.suggested_dosage_hint: The per-day dose for labelling. Format: "[quantity] [unit] per day" — this is the number the NRV calculation uses.
fields.appearance_hint: What the finished product looks like. Format: "[colour] [shape/size] [texture]". Gets printed verbatim on the spec sheet — avoid marketing language.
fields.appearance_placeholder_tablet: White round tablet, 10 mm diameter, smooth coating
fields.disintegration_spec_hint: Time for the dose to break down in water at 37 °C. Must match the test method on the QC sheet. Leave blank for gummies / powders / liquids (no disintegration requirement).

builder.picker_empty: No matches. Try a different search.
builder.picker_none_added: No ingredients yet. Pick one on the left.
builder.serving_size_banner: Serving = {units, plural, one {# unit} other {# units}}. Label claim is per-serving; computed mg are per-unit.
builder.no_raw_material_purity: This raw material is missing purity / extract ratio data — the formulation math cannot compute its mg/serving until you fix the source catalogue row.

codes.fill_shortfall: Add a carrier / bulking agent to reach the target
codes.capsule_too_large: Too large for any standard capsule

copy.tooltip: Click to copy the mg value

excipients.title: Excipients
excipients.per_serving: Per serving ({count, plural, one {# unit} other {# units}})

builder.unsupported_form: Excipient math for this dosage form is not yet supported. You can still track ingredients and metadata.

failure_reason.missing_extract_ratio: Missing extract ratio in raw material

mrpeasy_bom.title: MRPeasy BOM
mrpeasy_bom.hint: Per-1 kg breakdown for procurement. Pectin Premix collapses the gelling agent + premix sweetener into a single in-house BOM line — the label declaration still lists the components separately.
mrpeasy_bom.print_subtitle: Bill of materials per 1 kg of finished product.
mrpeasy_bom.empty_hint: Add at least one ingredient or set a target fill weight to compute the BOM.

overrides.title: Excipient ratios
overrides.hint: Per-band percentages of the target gummy weight. Edit any value to override the default; press Enter or tab away to commit. Reset to fall back to the default.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.empty_hint: Add ingredients to see compliance flags.
compliance.unknown_tooltip: {count} ingredient(s) have no value set. Chip fades when any aggregation answer is held without confidence.

declaration.title: Ingredient declaration
declaration.empty_hint: Add ingredients to generate the product's ingredient list.
declaration.sort_hint: Sorted descending by mg per serving. Allergens shown in bold.

versions.title: Version history
versions.rollback_confirm_body: The current working state will be replaced with the snapshot from v{version}. The rollback itself is saved as a new version so nothing is lost.

access_denied.title: Access denied
access_denied.body: Your membership does not grant access to formulations. Ask an owner for permission.
